FinancialMetric.name: Adjustments to Additional Paid in Capital, Income Tax Benefit from Share-based Compensation
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase in additional paid in capital (APIC) resulting from a tax benefit associated with share-based compensation plan other than an employee stock ownership plan (ESOP). Includes, but is not limited to, excess tax benefit.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Acquired Intangible Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of acquired intangible assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by (used in) operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Acquired Intangible Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of acquired intangible assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by (used in) operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Acquired Intangible Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of acquired intangible assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by (used in) operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Discount (Premium)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of noncash expense included in interest expense to amortize debt discount and premium associated with the related debt instruments. Excludes amortization of financing costs. Alternate captions include noncash interest expense.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Discount (Premium)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of noncash expense included in interest expense to amortize debt discount and premium associated with the related debt instruments. Excludes amortization of financing costs. Alternate captions include noncash interest expense.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Discount (Premium)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of noncash expense included in interest expense to amortize debt discount and premium associated with the related debt instruments. Excludes amortization of financing costs. Alternate captions include noncash interest expense.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Discount (Premium)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of noncash expense included in interest expense to amortize debt discount and premium associated with the related debt instruments. Excludes amortization of financing costs. Alternate captions include noncash interest expense.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Asset Retirement Obligation
FinancialMetric.description: The carrying amount of a liability for an asset retirement obligation. An asset retirement obligation is a legal obligation associated with the disposal or retirement of a tangible long-lived asset that results from the acquisition, construction or development, or the normal operations of a long-lived asset, except for certain obligations of lessees.

FinancialMetric.name: Asset Retirement Obligations, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Noncurrent portion of the carrying amount of a liability for an asset retirement obligation. An asset retirement obligation is a legal obligation associated with the disposal or retirement of a tangible long-lived asset that results from the acquisition, construction or development, or the normal operations of a long-lived asset, except for certain obligations of lessees.

FinancialMetric.name: Assets Held-for-sale, Current (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Current assets (normally turning over within one year or one business cycle if longer) that are held for sale apart from normal operations and anticipated to be sold within one year.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Securities, Available-for-sale, Accumulated Gross Unrealized Gain, before Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before tax, of unrealized gain in accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) on investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in other comprehensive income (available-for-sale).

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Securities, Available-for-sale, Accumulated Gross Unrealized Loss, before Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before tax, of unrealized loss in accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) on investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in other comprehensive income (available-for-sale).

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Change in Net Unrealized Holding Gain (Loss), Net of Tax (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The change in unrealized holding gain (loss), net of tax, on available-for-sale securities included in a separate component of shareholders' equity during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Change in Net Unrealized Holding Gain (Loss), Net of Tax (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The change in unrealized holding gain (loss), net of tax, on available-for-sale securities included in a separate component of shareholders' equity during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, 12 Months or Longer, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on securities classified as available-for-sale that have been in a loss position for twelve months or longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, 12 Months or Longer, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on securities classified as available-for-sale that have been in a loss position for twelve months or longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, 12 Months or Longer, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on securities classified as available-for-sale that have been in a loss position for twelve months or longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Less than 12 Months, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investments in available-for-sale securities that have been in a loss position for less than twelve months.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Less than 12 Months, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investments in available-for-sale securities that have been in a loss position for less than twelve months.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Continuous Unrealized Loss Position, Less than 12 Months, Aggregate Loss (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investments in available-for-sale securities that have been in a loss position for less than twelve months.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Securities, Available-for-sale, Maturity, without Single Maturity Date, Amortized Cost
FinancialMetric.description: Amortized cost of investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in other comprehensive income (available-for-sale), without single maturity date and not allocated over maturity grouping.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Securities, Available-for-sale, Maturity, without Single Maturity Date, Fair Value
FinancialMetric.description: Fair value of investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in other comprehensive income (available-for-sale), without single maturity date and not allocated over maturity grouping.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Fair Value Disclosure (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents the portion of the balance sheet assertion valued at fair value by the entity whether such amount is presented as a separate caption or as a parenthetical disclosure. Additionally, this element may be used in connection with the fair value disclosures required in the footnote disclosures to the financial statements. The element may be used in both the balance sheet and disclosure in the same submission. This item represents Available-for-sale Securities which consist of all investments in certain debt and equity securities neither classified as trading or held-to-maturity securities. A debt security represents a creditor relationship with an enterprise. Debt securities include, among other items, US Treasury securities, US government securities, municipal securities, corporate bonds, convertible debt, commercial paper, and all securitized debt instruments. An equity security represents an ownership interest in an enterprise or the right to acquire or dispose of an ownership interest in an enterprise at fixed or determinable prices. Equity securities include, among other things, common stock, certain preferred stock, warrant rights, call options, and put options, but do not include convertible debt. An entity may opt to provide the reader with additional narrative text to better understand the nature of investments in debt and equity securities which are categorized as Available-for-sale.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Realized Gain (Loss)
FinancialMetric.description: This item represents the difference between the gross realized gains and losses realized on the sale of debt or equity securities categorized neither as held-to-maturity nor trading securities. Additionally, this item would include any losses recognized for other than temporary impairments (OTTI) of the subject investments in debt and equity securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain before deducting unrealized loss on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain before deducting unrealized loss on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain before deducting unrealized loss on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain before deducting unrealized loss on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss before deducting unrealized gain on investments in available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss before deducting unrealized gain on investments in available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss before deducting unrealized gain on investments in available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss before deducting unrealized gain on investments in available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale, Securities in Unrealized Loss Positions, Qualitative Disclosure, Number of Positions (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Disclosure regarding factors used to determine that the impairment of securities not categorized as either held-to-maturity securities or trading securities (hence equal to available for sale securities) where cost exceeds fair value is not an other than temporary impairment (OTTI). This item contains disclosure of the number of investment positions in the available-for-sale investments determined to be temporarily impaired.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain (Loss) (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain (Loss) (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain (Loss) (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale Securities, Gross Unrealized Gain (Loss) (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investments in debt and equity securities classified as available-for-sale securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Available-for-sale, Securities in Unrealized Loss Positions, Qualitative Disclosure, Number of Positions
FinancialMetric.description: Number of investment positions in available-for-sale investments in a continuous unrealized loss position for which an other-than-temporary impairment (OTTI) has not been recognized in the income statement.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Contingent Consideration, Potential Cash Payment (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of potential cash payments that could result from the contingent consideration arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Transaction Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of direct costs of the business combination including legal, accounting, and other costs incurred to consummate the business acquisition.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma basic net income per share for a period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of a period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma basic net income per share for a period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of a period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma basic net income per share for a period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of a period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Earnings Per Share, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma diluted net income per share for a period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of a period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Net Income (Loss) (Deprecated 2011-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma net Income or Loss for the period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of a period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Revenue (Deprecated 2011-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma revenue for a period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Amortizable Intangible Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of acquisition cost of a business combination allocated to an identifiable intangible asset that will be amortized.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Assets Acquired (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Assets Acquired (Liabilities Assumed), Net (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The total purchase price of the acquired entity. This includes cash paid to equity interest holders of the acquired entity, fair value of debt and equity securities issued to equity holders of the acquired entity, and transaction costs paid to third parties to consummate the acquisition.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Assets, Inventory (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of acquisition cost of a business combination allocated to inventory, including finished goods, work-in-process, and raw materials.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Assets, Prepaid Expense and Other Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of acquisition cost of a business combination allocated to prepaid expenses and other current assets. Does not include amounts allocated to cash and cash equivalents, marketable securities, receivables, inventory, and assets not to be used.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Assets, Receivables (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Liabilities, Accounts Payable (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Liabilities, Accounts Payable (Deprecated 2013-01-31)

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Liabilities, Accrued Liabilities (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Current Liabilities, Accrued Liabilities (Deprecated 2013-01-31)

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Goodwill Amount (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of goodwill arising from a business combination, which is the excess of the cost of the acquired entity over the amounts assigned to assets acquired and liabilities assumed.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Noncurrent Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Notes Payable and Long-term Debt (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of acquisition cost of a business combination allocated to notes payables and long-term debt assumed from the acquired entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Other Noncurrent Assets (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of acquisition cost of a business combination allocated to other noncurrent assets not separately disclosed.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Purchase Price Allocation, Property, Plant and Equipment (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of acquisition cost of a business combination allocated to property, plant and equipment to be used in ongoing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Net Income (Loss)
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma net Income or Loss for the period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of a period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Acquisition, Pro Forma Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: The pro forma revenue for a period as if the business combination or combinations had been completed at the beginning of the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Combination, Acquisition Related Costs
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents acquisition-related costs incurred to effect a business combination which costs have been expensed during the period. Such costs include finder's fees; advisory, legal, accounting, valuation, and other professional or consulting fees; general administrative costs, including the costs of maintaining an internal acquisitions department; and may include costs of registering and issuing debt and equity securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Lease Obligations, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of capital lease obligation due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Lease Obligations, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount equal to the present value (the principal) at the beginning of the lease term of minimum lease payments during the lease term (excluding that portion of the payments representing executory costs such as insurance, maintenance, and taxes to be paid by the lessor, together with any profit thereon) net of payments or other amounts applied to the principal, through the balance sheet date and due to be paid more than one year (or one operating cycle, if longer) after the balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Present Value of Net Minimum Payments
FinancialMetric.description: Present value of minimum lease payments for capital leases net of executory costs, including amounts paid by the lessee to the lessor for insurance, maintenance and taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash Equivalents, at Carrying Value
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Excludes cash and cash equivalents within disposal group and discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Class of Warrant or Right, Number of Securities Called by Each Warrant or Right
FinancialMetric.description: Number of securities into which each warrant or right may be converted. For example, but not limited to, each warrant may be converted into two shares.

FinancialMetric.name: Class of Warrant or Right, Number of Securities Called by Warrants or Rights
FinancialMetric.description: Number of securities into which the class of warrant or right may be converted. For example, but not limited to, 500,000 warrants may be converted into 1,000,000 shares.

FinancialMetric.name: Class of Warrant or Right, Outstanding
FinancialMetric.description: Number of warrants or rights outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Commitments and Contingencies
FinancialMetric.description: Represents the caption on the face of the balance sheet to indicate that the entity has entered into (1) purchase or supply arrangements that will require expending a portion of its resources to meet the terms thereof, and (2) is exposed to potential losses or, less frequently, gains, arising from (a) possible claims against a company's resources due to future performance under contract terms, and (b) possible losses or likely gains from uncertainties that will ultimately be resolved when one or more future events that are deemed likely to occur do occur or fail to occur.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Capital Shares Reserved for Future Issuance
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate number of common shares reserved for future issuance.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Par or Stated Value Per Share
FinancialMetric.description: Face amount or stated value per share of common stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Increase (Decrease) for Contract Acquired in Business Combination
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due, from business combination.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Increase (Decrease) for Contract Acquired in Business Combination
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due, from business combination.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Increase (Decrease) for Contract Acquired in Business Combination
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due, from business combination.

FinancialMetric.name: Convertible Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Including the current and noncurrent portions, carrying amount of debt identified as being convertible into another form of financial instrument (typically the entity's common stock) as of the balance sheet date, which originally required full repayment more than twelve months after issuance or greater than the normal operating cycle of the company.

FinancialMetric.name: Convertible Debt, Fair Value Disclosures
FinancialMetric.description: Fair value portion of borrowing which can be exchanged for a specified number of another security at the option of the issuer or the holder, for example, but not limited to, the entity's common stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Convertible Debt, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying amount of long-term convertible debt as of the balance sheet date, net of the amount due in the next twelve months or greater than the normal operating cycle, if longer. The debt is convertible into another form of financial instrument, typically the entity's common stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold, Amortization (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the costs of intangible assets over the expected benefit period of such assets. This element applies only to intangible assets used in the production of goods.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold, Amortization (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the costs of intangible assets over the expected benefit period of such assets. This element applies only to intangible assets used in the production of goods.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold, Amortization (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the costs of intangible assets over the expected benefit period of such assets. This element applies only to intangible assets used in the production of goods.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold, Amortization (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the costs of intangible assets over the expected benefit period of such assets. This element applies only to intangible assets used in the production of goods.

FinancialMetric.name: Cumulative Effect of New Accounting Principle in Period of Adoption (Deprecated 2020-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) to equity or (increase) decrease to net assets, resulting from the cumulative effect adjustment of a new accounting principle applied in the period of adoption.

FinancialMetric.name: Current State and Local Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of current state and local tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Customer Advances and Deposits
FinancialMetric.description: Refundable consideration, usually cash, held by the entity pending satisfactory completion of the entity's obligations or pending the closing of a contract.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Conversion, Converted Instrument, Shares Issued
FinancialMetric.description: "The number of shares issued in exchange for the original debt being converted in a noncash (or part noncash) transaction. ""Part noncash"" refers to that portion of the transaction not resulting in cash receipts or payments in the period."

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Conversion, Converted Instrument, Shares Issued
FinancialMetric.description: "The number of shares issued in exchange for the original debt being converted in a noncash (or part noncash) transaction. ""Part noncash"" refers to that portion of the transaction not resulting in cash receipts or payments in the period."

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Conversion, Converted Instrument, Shares Issued
FinancialMetric.description: "The number of shares issued in exchange for the original debt being converted in a noncash (or part noncash) transaction. ""Part noncash"" refers to that portion of the transaction not resulting in cash receipts or payments in the period."

FinancialMetric.name: Debt, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of short-term debt and current maturity of long-term debt and capital lease obligations due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Carrying Amount of Equity Component
FinancialMetric.description: The carrying amount of the equity component of convertible debt which may be settled in cash upon conversion.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Price
FinancialMetric.description: The price per share of the conversion feature embedded in the debt instrument.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Ratio (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The ratio applied to the debt for purposes of determining the number of shares of the equity security into which the debt will be converted.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Ratio (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The ratio applied to the debt for purposes of determining the number of shares of the equity security into which the debt will be converted.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Ratio
FinancialMetric.description: Ratio applied to the conversion of debt instrument into equity with equity shares divided by debt principal amount.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Ratio
FinancialMetric.description: Ratio applied to the conversion of debt instrument into equity with equity shares divided by debt principal amount.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Ratio
FinancialMetric.description: Ratio applied to the conversion of debt instrument into equity with equity shares divided by debt principal amount.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Conversion Ratio
FinancialMetric.description: Ratio applied to the conversion of debt instrument into equity with equity shares divided by debt principal amount.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Effective Interest Rate (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The effective interest rate on the liability component of convertible debt instrument which may be settled in cash upon conversion, including partial cash settlement.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Effective Interest Rate (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The effective interest rate on the liability component of convertible debt instrument which may be settled in cash upon conversion, including partial cash settlement.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, If-converted Value in Excess of Principal
FinancialMetric.description: The amount by which the convertible debt's if-converted value exceeds its principle amount at the balance sheet date, regardless of whether the instrument is currently convertible. This element applies to public companies only.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, If-converted Value in Excess of Principal
FinancialMetric.description: The amount by which the convertible debt's if-converted value exceeds its principle amount at the balance sheet date, regardless of whether the instrument is currently convertible. This element applies to public companies only.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Interest Expense (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Interest expense related to convertible debt instruments which has been recognized for the period, including the contractual interest coupon and amortization of the debt discount, if any.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Interest Expense (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Interest expense related to convertible debt instruments which has been recognized for the period, including the contractual interest coupon and amortization of the debt discount, if any.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Number of Equity Instruments
FinancialMetric.description: The number of equity instruments that the holder of the debt instrument would receive if the debt was converted to equity.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Threshold Percentage of Stock Price Trigger
FinancialMetric.description: Minimum percentage of common stock price to conversion price of convertible debt instruments to determine eligibility of conversion.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Convertible, Threshold Percentage of Stock Price Trigger
FinancialMetric.description: Minimum percentage of common stock price to conversion price of convertible debt instruments to determine eligibility of conversion.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Interest Rate, Effective Percentage
FinancialMetric.description: Effective interest rate for the funds borrowed under the debt agreement considering interest compounding and original issue discount or premium.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Interest Rate, Stated Percentage
FinancialMetric.description: Contractual interest rate for funds borrowed, under the debt agreement.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Compensation Liability, Classified, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate carrying value as of the balance sheet date of the liabilities for all deferred compensation arrangements payable beyond one year (or the operating cycle, if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Income Tax Assets, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after allocation of valuation allowances and deferred tax liability, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible differences and carryforwards, with jurisdictional netting.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Rent Credit
FinancialMetric.description: The cumulative difference between the rental payments required by a lease agreement and the rental income or expense recognized on a straight-line basis, or other systematic and rational basis more representative of the time pattern in which use or benefit is granted or derived from the leased property, expected to be recognized in income or expense over the term of the leased property by the lessor or lessee, respectively.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Revenue, Additions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred revenue recognized for transactions arising during the current reporting period. Deferred revenue is a liability as of the balance sheet date related to a revenue producing activity for which revenue has not yet been recognized. Generally, an Entity records deferred revenue when it receives consideration from a customer before achieving certain criteria that must be met for revenue to be recognized in conformity with GAAP.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Revenue, Revenue Recognized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously reported as deferred or unearned revenue.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Gross, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards, classified as noncurrent.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating Loss Carryforwards, Domestic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible domestic operating loss carryforwards. Excludes state and local operating loss carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating Loss Carryforwards, Foreign
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible foreign operating loss carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating Loss Carryforwards, State and Local
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible state and local operating loss carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of a valuation allowances, of deferred tax assets attributable to deductible tax credit carryforwards including, but not limited to, research, foreign, general business, alternative minimum tax, and other deductible tax credit carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible tax credit carryforwards, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards, Research
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible research tax credit carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Reserves and Accruals
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from reserves and accruals.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Expense from Stock Options Exercised
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax expense from write-off of the deferred tax asset related to deductible stock options at exercise.

FinancialMetric.name: Deposits Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value of amounts transferred to third parties for security purposes that are expected to be returned or applied towards payment in the future.

FinancialMetric.name: Deposits Assets, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value of amounts transferred to third parties for security purposes that are expected to be returned or applied towards payment after one year or beyond the operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization, Nonproduction
FinancialMetric.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization, Nonproduction
FinancialMetric.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization, Nonproduction
FinancialMetric.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible assets, intangible assets, or depleting assets to periods that benefit from use of the assets.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible assets, intangible assets, or depleting assets to periods that benefit from use of the assets.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible assets, intangible assets, or depleting assets to periods that benefit from use of the assets.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible assets, intangible assets, or depleting assets to periods that benefit from use of the assets.

FinancialMetric.name: Dividends
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of paid and unpaid cash, stock, and paid-in-kind (PIK) dividends declared, for example, but not limited to, common and preferred stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Dividends
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of paid and unpaid cash, stock, and paid-in-kind (PIK) dividends declared, for example, but not limited to, common and preferred stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, at Federal Statutory Income Tax Rate, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Net earnings after all expenses and taxes

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Amount Capitalized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cost capitalized for award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Cost Not yet Recognized, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cost not yet recognized for nonvested award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Nonvested Awards, Total Compensation Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The weighted average period over which unrecognized compensation is expected to be recognized for equity-based compensation plans, using a decimal to express in number of years.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee Service Share-based Compensation, Unrecognized Compensation Costs on Nonvested Awards (Deprecated 2011-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: As of the latest balance sheet date presented, the total compensation cost related to outstanding, nonvested equity-based compensation awards not yet recognized (will be charged against earnings as services are performed or other vesting criteria are met).

FinancialMetric.name: Disclosure on Geographic Areas, Long-Lived Assets in Individual Foreign Countries, Amount (Deprecated 2011-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of long-lived assets other than financial instruments, long-term customer relationships of a financial institution, mortgage and other servicing rights, deferred policy acquisition costs, and deferred tax assets located in foreign countries. An entity also may provide subtotals of geographic information about groups of countries; accordingly, this element also may be used to provide the amount of such long-lived assets for a group of countries.

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Gain
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Equity Securities, FV-NI, Unrealized Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized loss on investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

FinancialMetric.name: Extinguishment of Debt, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Gross amount of debt extinguished.

FinancialMetric.name: Extinguishment of Debt, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Gross amount of debt extinguished.

FinancialMetric.name: Extinguishment of Debt, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Gross amount of debt extinguished.

FinancialMetric.name: Fair Value, Measurement with Unobservable Inputs Reconciliation, Recurring Basis, Asset, Transfers, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of transfer of financial instrument classified as an asset into (out of) level 3 of the fair value hierarchy.

FinancialMetric.name: Fair Value, Measurement with Unobservable Inputs Reconciliation, Recurring Basis, Asset, Transfers, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of transfer of financial instrument classified as an asset into (out of) level 3 of the fair value hierarchy.

FinancialMetric.name: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in carrying value of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

FinancialMetric.name: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in carrying value of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

FinancialMetric.name: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Useful Life (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.name: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Useful Life (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.description: Total resources owned by the company

FinancialMetric.name: Foreign Currency Transaction Gain (Loss), Realized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before tax of foreign currency transaction realized gain (loss) recognized in the income statement.

FinancialMetric.name: Future Amortization Expense, Remainder of Fiscal Year (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during the remainder of the current fiscal year.

FinancialMetric.name: Future Amortization Expense, Remainder of Fiscal Year (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during the remainder of the current fiscal year.

FinancialMetric.name: Future Amortization Expense, Remainder of Fiscal Year (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during the remainder of the current fiscal year.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness
FinancialMetric.description: The net gain (loss) during the reporting period due to ineffectiveness in foreign currency cash flow hedges. Recognized in earnings.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness
FinancialMetric.description: The net gain (loss) during the reporting period due to ineffectiveness in foreign currency cash flow hedges. Recognized in earnings.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness
FinancialMetric.description: The net gain (loss) during the reporting period due to ineffectiveness in foreign currency cash flow hedges. Recognized in earnings.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness
FinancialMetric.description: The net gain (loss) during the reporting period due to ineffectiveness in foreign currency cash flow hedges. Recognized in earnings.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Goodwill, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.name: Goodwill, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.name: Goodwill, Translation and Purchase Accounting Adjustments
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) from foreign currency translation adjustments and purchase accounting adjustments of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.name: Goodwill, Translation and Purchase Accounting Adjustments
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) from foreign currency translation adjustments and purchase accounting adjustments of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.name: Other than Temporary Impairment Losses, Investments
FinancialMetric.description: The amount by which the fair value of an investment is less than the amortized cost basis or carrying amount of that investment at the balance sheet date and the decline in fair value is deemed to be other than temporary, before considering whether or not such amount is recognized in earnings or other comprehensive income.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations, Adjustment of Deferred Tax (Asset) Liability
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income tax expense (benefit) from continuing operations attributable to an adjustment of a deferred tax liability or asset for enacted changes in tax laws or rates or a change in the tax status of the entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Taxes Paid, Net
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Taxes Paid, Net
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Taxes Paid, Net
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Nondeductible Expense, Restructuring Charges, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to nondeductible restructuring charges.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Other Adjustments, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to other adjustments.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Research, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to research tax credit.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Accrued Liabilities

FinancialMetric.name: Incremental Common Shares Attributable to Dilutive Effect of Call Options and Warrants
FinancialMetric.description: Additional shares included in the calculation of diluted EPS as a result of the potentially dilutive effect of call options and warrants using the treasury stock method.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Paid, Excluding Capitalized Interest, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash paid for interest, excluding capitalized interest, classified as operating activity. Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

FinancialMetric.name: Marketable Securities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of investment in marketable security, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Marketable Securities, Realized Gain (Loss), Excluding Other-than-temporary Impairment Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of realized gain (loss) on investment in marketable security, excluding other-than-temporary impairment (OTTI).

FinancialMetric.name: Marketable Securities, Realized Gain (Loss), Excluding Other-than-temporary Impairment Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of realized gain (loss) on investment in marketable security, excluding other-than-temporary impairment (OTTI).

FinancialMetric.name: Marketable Securities, Realized Gain (Loss), Excluding Other-than-temporary Impairment Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of realized gain (loss) on investment in marketable security, excluding other-than-temporary impairment (OTTI).

FinancialMetric.name: Marketable Securities, Realized Gain (Loss), Excluding Other-than-temporary Impairment Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of realized gain (loss) on investment in marketable security, excluding other-than-temporary impairment (OTTI).

FinancialMetric.name: Materials, Supplies, and Other
FinancialMetric.description: The carrying amount of capitalized costs of materials, supplies, and other assets, which are not included in inventory but used in production.

FinancialMetric.name: Money Market Funds, at Carrying Value
FinancialMetric.description: Investment in short-term money-market instruments (such as commercial paper, banker's acceptances, repurchase agreements, government securities, certificates of deposit, and so forth) which are highly liquid (that is, readily convertible to known amounts of cash) and so near their maturity that they present an insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Generally, only investments with original maturities of three months or less qualify as cash equivalents by definition. Original maturity means an original maturity to the entity holding the investment. For example, both a three-month US Treasury bill and a three-year Treasury note purchased three months from maturity qualify as cash equivalents. However, a Treasury note purchased three-years ago does not become a cash equivalent when its remaining maturity is three months.

FinancialMetric.name: Noncash or Part Noncash Acquisition, Intangible Assets Acquired (Deprecated 2011-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of intangibles that an Entity acquires in a noncash (or part noncash) acquisition. Noncash is defined as information about all investing and financing activities of an enterprise during a period that affect recognized assets or liabilities but that do not result in cash receipts or cash payments in the period. "Part noncash" refers to that portion of the transaction not resulting in cash receipts or cash payments in the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Foreign Currency Derivatives Held
FinancialMetric.description: Number of foreign currency exchange rate derivatives held by the entity at the reporting date.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Lease, Liability, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments Due
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable letter-terms in excess of one year.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments Due, Next Twelve Months
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the next fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Five Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Four Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the fourth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Three Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the third fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Two Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the second fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due Thereafter
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due after the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Option Indexed to Issuer's Equity, Strike Price
FinancialMetric.description: Exercise or strike price stated in the contract for options indexed to the issuer's equity shares.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Accrued Liabilities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expenses incurred but not yet paid classified as other, due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Assets, Miscellaneous, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other miscellaneous assets expected to be realized or consumed after one year or normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment
FinancialMetric.description: Minimum amount of other commitment not otherwise specified in the taxonomy. Excludes commitments explicitly modeled in the taxonomy, including but not limited to, long-term and short-term purchase commitments, recorded and unrecorded purchase obligations, supply commitments, registration payment arrangements, leases, debt, product warranties, guarantees, environmental remediation obligations, and pensions.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Available-for-sale Securities Adjustment, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of appreciation (loss) in value of unsold available-for-sale securities, attributable to parent entity. Excludes amounts related to other than temporary impairment (OTTI) loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Available-for-sale Securities Adjustment, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of appreciation (loss) in value of unsold available-for-sale securities, attributable to parent entity. Excludes amounts related to other than temporary impairment (OTTI) loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Available-for-sale Securities Adjustment, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of appreciation (loss) in value of unsold available-for-sale securities, attributable to parent entity. Excludes amounts related to other than temporary impairment (OTTI) loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Available-for-sale Securities Adjustment, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of appreciation (loss) in value of unsold available-for-sale securities, attributable to parent entity. Excludes amounts related to other than temporary impairment (OTTI) loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Derivatives Qualifying as Hedges, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of increase (decrease) in accumulated gain (loss) from derivative instruments designated and qualifying as the effective portion of cash flow hedges and an entity's share of an equity investee's increase (decrease) in deferred hedging gain (loss), attributable to parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Derivatives Qualifying as Hedges, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of increase (decrease) in accumulated gain (loss) from derivative instruments designated and qualifying as the effective portion of cash flow hedges and an entity's share of an equity investee's increase (decrease) in deferred hedging gain (loss), attributable to parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Derivatives Qualifying as Hedges, Net of Tax, Portion Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments, of increase (decrease) in accumulated gain (loss) from derivative instruments designated and qualifying as the effective portion of cash flow hedges and an entity's share of an equity investee's increase (decrease) in deferred hedging gain (loss), attributable to parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: OCI, Debt Securities, Available-for-Sale, Gain (Loss), after Adjustment, before Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before tax and after adjustment, of unrealized gain (loss) on investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in other comprehensive income (available-for-sale) and unrealized gain (loss) on investment in debt security measured at amortized cost (held-to-maturity) from transfer to available-for-sale.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification of gain (loss) from accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) for derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification of gain (loss) from accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) for derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification of gain (loss) from accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) for derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification of gain (loss) from accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) for derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents Other Comprehensive Income or Loss, Net of Tax, for the period. Includes deferred gains or losses on qualifying hedges, unrealized holding gains or losses on available-for-sale securities, minimum pension liability, and cumulative translation adjustment. While for technical reasons this element has no balance attribute, the default assumption is a credit balance consistent with its label.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents Other Comprehensive Income or Loss, Net of Tax, for the period. Includes deferred gains or losses on qualifying hedges, unrealized holding gains or losses on available-for-sale securities, minimum pension liability, and cumulative translation adjustment. While for technical reasons this element has no balance attribute, the default assumption is a credit balance consistent with its label.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents Other Comprehensive Income or Loss, Net of Tax, for the period. Includes deferred gains or losses on qualifying hedges, unrealized holding gains or losses on available-for-sale securities, minimum pension liability, and cumulative translation adjustment. While for technical reasons this element has no balance attribute, the default assumption is a credit balance consistent with its label.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Reclassification Adjustment for Sale of Securities Included in Net Income, Tax (Deprecated 2013-01-31)

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI for Sale of Securities, Net of Tax

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Defined Benefit Plan, Gain (Loss), Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI, after Tax

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Defined Benefit Plan, Gain (Loss), Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI, after Tax
